title: ageratina miahuatlana
intro: Ageratina miahuatlana, also known as Miahuatlán ageratina, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in Mexican folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions, among others. Ageratina miahuatlana can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments.
